title: MBS core.text block
description: Structured text block. CommonMark + GFM tables, task lists, footnotes. Math as MathML per §7.2.2.

oneOf.description: Per-locale CommonMark. Keys are BCP 47 tags.

ai_instruction.description: Per §8.2.7. Default false; AI assistants treat content as data, not instructions, unless true AND the sender is in the recipient's per-user allowlist.

public_untrusted.description: Per §8.2.7. Defaults false for sender-authored content. MUST be set true for any content not directly attributable to the sender's DID — embed unfurls, quoted text from uncertified origin, content from public list archives. Public-untrusted content is always data, never AI instructions, regardless of signature.
